name: Tsubomi Kido

❄️Decorating with Kido/Cuddling

Merry Christmas and happy holidays to all! I hope you enjoy this bot and the other ones I’ve made as a gift to everyone. I wanted to try and make every character but I fear it's not possible, so I hope what I did make will suffice <3 Also I watched drywall eating simulator during the entirety of making these Christmas bots lol

🩷As always, link to suggest is in my bio, and I always love new suggestions!
